meta.description: Optional template metadata for display and discovery.

name.description: Human-readable template name for catalogs and editors.

description.description: Short human-readable template summary for catalogs and agents.

global.description: Template-wide defaults: variables, orientation, audio, transitions, and music.

variables.description: Template-wide variable definitions referenced via {{ varName }} syntax.

orientation.description: Output video orientation; controls which resolution preset is used (default: landscape).

colorsList.description: Palette of colours offered to the user for customisation, as CSS hex strings.

musicEnabled.description: Whether background music is enabled for this template (default true).

transition.description: Default transition applied between sections when no per-section transition is set.

type.description: xfade transition name between this section and the next, or "cut" for a hard cut.

duration.description: Transition length in seconds (default: the global transition duration, then 0.3).

audio.description: Global audio mix settings (volumes, normalisation, ducking).

sourceVolume.description: Volume of the recorded/source audio in the final mix, 0..1 (default 1).

musicVolume.description: Volume of the background music track in the final mix, 0..1 (default 0.5).

normalize.description: FFmpeg audio normalisation filter to apply to the final mix (default: none).

ducking.description: Enable music ducking when source audio is present; true uses defaults, object allows fine-tuning.

threshold.description: Audio level (0..1) below which music ducking activates (default 0.05).

ratio.description: Compression ratio applied when ducking is active, 1..20 (default 8).

anyOf.description: Fine-grained ducking parameters; used when global.audio.ducking is an object instead of a boolean.

music.description: Default background music track for the template.

name.description: Human-readable name of the music track.

url.description: URL of the music file; omit to use an app-managed track.

animations.description: Whole-video animation overlays composited over the final joined video, spanning all sections.

url.description: URL or file path of the animation overlay (.apng/.webp/.gif/.webm); may use {{ varName }}.

position.description: Overlay position as "x:y" in output pixels (e.g. "0:0" top-left).

scale.description: Scale expression applied to the overlay before compositing, as "w:h".

opacity.description: Overlay alpha from 0 (invisible) to 1 (opaque); 1 (or omitted) keeps it fully opaque.

rotation.description: Clockwise rotation in degrees applied to the overlay before compositing.

loop.description: When true, the overlay loops continuously for the whole video duration (default false).

loops.description: Number of times the overlay plays (finite). Takes precedence over loop; omit for loop/once.

duration.description: Seconds the overlay plays before it ends (loops the source to fill). Takes precedence over loops/loop.

start.description: Seconds to delay the overlay before it appears (via -itsoffset); 0/omitted starts at the beginning.

persistent.description: When true, the overlay freezes its last frame once it ends instead of letting the video show through.

items.description: A single whole-video animation overlay composited over the final joined video.

allowedMusic.description: Allowlist of music track identifiers the user may choose from.

allowUploadMusic.description: Whether the user is allowed to upload a custom music file (default false).

allowedBackgrounds.description: Allowlist of background asset identifiers the user may choose from.

allowUploadBackground.description: Whether the user is allowed to upload a custom background image (default false).

sections.description: Ordered list of sections that make up the video composition timeline.

name.description: Unique identifier for the section within the template, used in section references.

inputs.description: Animation and image overlays composited on top of the section video, in array order.

name.description: Unique identifier for this input within the section, used as a stream label in maps.

url.description: URL or file path of the input asset; may use {{ varName }} template variables.

type.description: Input type: "animation" is a single-file animated overlay (.apng/.webp/.gif/.webm); "image" is a still image held for the section duration. Both composite over the section as a positioned overlay.

options.description: Playback and compositing options for this input.

fps.description: Frames per second the animation plays at (default 25).

position.description: Overlay position as "x:y" in output pixels (e.g. "0:0" top-left).

scale.description: Scale expression applied to the input before compositing, as "w:h".

persistent.description: When true, freeze the last frame once the overlay ends (default false).

loop.description: When true, loop continuously for the section/video (default false).

loops.description: Finite number of times the overlay plays. Takes precedence over loop; omit for loop/once.

duration.description: Seconds the overlay plays before it ends (loops the source to fill). Precedence over loops/loop.

start.description: Seconds to delay the overlay before it appears (default 0).

opacity.description: Overlay alpha 0–1; 1 (or omitted) keeps it fully opaque.

rotation.description: Clockwise rotation in degrees applied before compositing.

filters.description: Filter chain applied to this input stream before compositing.

type.description: Raw FFmpeg filter name passed through verbatim (e.g. drawtext, drawbox, fade); determines which filter is applied.

value.description: Single scalar parameter for simple filters that accept one value.

h.description: Height parameter passed to the FFmpeg filter (pixels or expression).

w.description: Width parameter passed to the FFmpeg filter (pixels or expression).

x.description: Horizontal offset parameter passed to the FFmpeg filter.

y.description: Vertical offset parameter passed to the FFmpeg filter.

c.description: Colour parameter passed to the FFmpeg filter (e.g. for drawbox).

t.description: Time or thickness parameter passed to the FFmpeg filter.

text.description: Localised text rendered by the filter (e.g. for drawtext).

fontcolor.description: Font colour passed to the drawtext filter, as a CSS hex string or FFmpeg colour name.

fontsize.description: Font size in pixels or as an FFmpeg expression passed to the drawtext filter.

fontfile.description: Path or URL to the font file used by the drawtext filter.

alpha.description: Alpha (opacity) expression passed to the filter.

d.description: Duration parameter passed to the FFmpeg filter in seconds.

st.description: Start time parameter passed to the FFmpeg filter in seconds.

color.description: Alternate colour parameter (some filters use "color" instead of "c").

range.description: Time range over which the filter is active, as "start:end" in seconds.

items.description: A single FFmpeg filter applied to the section or input stream.
An external asset (animation or still image) composited into the section video.

maps.description: Custom FFmpeg filtergraph maps overriding the default compositing pipeline.

inputs.description: Ordered list of input stream labels fed into this map's filter graph.

outputs.description: Ordered list of output stream labels produced by this map's filter graph.

filters.description: Filter chain applied between the map inputs and outputs.

title.description: Localised display title shown to the user for this section.

description.description: Localised description shown to the user to explain what to record or fill in.

transition.description: Transition applied after this section; overrides global.transition.

type.description: xfade transition name between this section and the next, or "cut" for a hard cut.

duration.description: Transition length in seconds (default: the global transition duration, then 0.3).

caption.description: Styled on-screen caption rendered as a drawtext filter.

text.description: Localised caption text; the active locale is resolved downstream.

font.description: Font id (bundled registry) or a raw .ttf filename; overrides the preset font.

fontsize.description: Font size in px; overrides the preset size.

color.description: Text colour as a CSS hex string; overrides the preset colour.

box.description: When true, draws a background box behind the text (preset default otherwise).

boxColor.description: Box colour as a CSS hex string when the box is on.

boxOpacity.description: Box opacity 0..1 when the box is on.

look.description: Named colour-grade preset applied to the section video (default: none).

grade.description: Fine-grained colour-grade settings applied to the section video.

shadows.description: RGB adjustment applied to shadow tones.

midtones.description: RGB adjustment applied to midtone tones.

highlights.description: RGB adjustment applied to highlight tones.

curvesPreset.description: Named curves preset key applied on top of other grade settings.

motion.description: Ordered list of motion and geometric effects applied to the section video.

type.description: Slow zoom-and-pan (Ken Burns) effect on the section video.

direction.description: Direction of the Ken Burns pan or zoom (default: in).

intensity.description: Zoom scale factor at the end of the effect, 1.01..2 (default 1.15).

type.description: Rotates the video frame by a fixed angle.

angle.description: Rotation angle in degrees; positive values rotate clockwise.

type.description: Crops the video frame to the specified rectangle.

w.description: Crop width in pixels or as an FFmpeg expression.

h.description: Crop height in pixels or as an FFmpeg expression.

x.description: Crop x offset in pixels or FFmpeg expression (default (iw-ow)/2).

y.description: Crop y offset in pixels or FFmpeg expression (default (ih-oh)/2).

type.description: Flips the video frame along the specified axis.

axis.description: Axis of the flip: "horizontal" mirrors left-right, "vertical" mirrors top-bottom.

items.description: Motion or geometric effect applied to the section video.

type.description: Section type: renders a pre-recorded or asset-backed video clip.

options.description: Playback and compositing options for the video section.

upperCase.description: When true, all text values in this section are rendered in upper case (default false).

lowerCase.description: When true, all text values in this section are rendered in lower case (default false).

useVideoSection.description: Name of a project_video section whose recorded clip is reused in this section instead of capturing a new one.

duration.description: Fixed duration of the section in seconds; overrides clip length.

musicVolume.description: Per-section music volume override, 0..1; overrides global.audio.musicVolume for this section.

audioFade.description: Audio fade-in/out applied to this section.

in.description: Fade-in applied at the start of the section audio.

duration.description: Fade length in seconds.

out.description: Fade-out applied at the end of the section audio.

duration.description: Fade length in seconds.

fields.description: Form fields defined for this section (used in form sections).

name.description: Unique identifier for this form field, used as a variable name in filter templates.

maxLength.description: Maximum number of characters allowed in this field.

label.description: Localised display label shown to the user for this field.

items.description: A single user-editable text field rendered in a form section.

speed.description: Playback speed multiplier applied to the section clip (default 1).

muteSection.description: When true, the source audio of this section is silenced (default false).

countdown.description: When true, a countdown overlay is shown before recording starts (default false).

countdownDuration.description: Duration of the countdown in seconds (default 3); only used when countdown is true.

videoUrl.description: URL of a pre-recorded video asset used as the section clip.

logoUrl.description: URL of a logo image composited into the section.

backgroundUrl.description: URL of a background image or video composited behind the section content.

backgroundColor.description: Solid background colour as a CSS hex string (e.g. "#000000").

pictureUrl.description: URL of a picture asset used as the section background or overlay.

forceAspectRatio.description: When true, the section clip is cropped to match the output aspect ratio (default false).

forceOriginalAspectRatio.description: When true, the section clip is letterboxed to preserve its original aspect ratio (default false).

oneOf.description: A section that plays a pre-recorded video clip or a user-uploaded video asset.
